content.body: If you're tempted to write a memory that says "current project status: X, Y, Z, pending A, B", stop. That will be garbage in 1 week. Think about whether there's a genuine **lesson** in what you want to save. If there isn't, it probably shouldn't be a memory — it should be a one-shot report that lives in `outputs/` for that session.
content.heading: Anti-pattern: memory as "last snapshot"
